tasks.label: Run: app.exe (Debug)
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; cmake --build build --config Debug; $p1=Join-Path $pwd 'build\app.exe'; $p2=Join-Path $pwd 'build\Debug\app.exe'; if (Test-Path $p1) { & $p1 } elseif (Test-Path $p2) { & $p2 } else { throw 'No se encontró app.exe en build\app.exe ni build\Debug\app.exe' }
